title: Pressure Configuration
description: Configuration schema for pressure static site bundler

dir.description: The output directory for the bundled files

entryPoints.description: An array of entry points for esbuild

external.description: An array of packages to be treated as external

html.description: An array of HTML files to process

htmlPath.description: Path mapping for HTML files, e.g., "public:dist"

assets.description: An array of asset directories to copy
